title: SACRAMENTO
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Industrial emissions are the second largest source of greenhouse gas emissions in California.",
    "Industrial emissions from California’s manufacturing facilities make up 23% of greenhouse gas emissions in the state.",
    "Industrial emissions have largely remained unaddressed in California.",
    "California has no clear plan or strategy to decarbonize the industrial sector to meet its 2030 or 2045 GHG emissions targets.",
    "Many solutions needed to clean up emissions from California’s industrial sector are already widely available.",
    "California businesses are using electric ovens and heat pumps to mass produce goods.",
    "California businesses are beginning to deploy thermal energy storage to provide high temperature, zero-emissions heat.",
    "AB 2083 aims to reduce GHG emissions in the state’s industrial facilities’ heat application equipment and processes by at least 85 percent below 1990 levels by January 1, 2045.",
    "The roadmap created by AB 2083 is expected to deliver tangible health benefits for overburdened communities.",
    "AB 2083 provides California’s manufacturing businesses with funding assistance and market certainty for sustained economic growth.",
    "Manufacturing industries are critical to California's economy."
  ]
}
```
